title: Anti-money laundering
body: We will perform client due diligence in line with Money Laundering Regulations 2017, including identity verification and risk assessment, before commencing work.

title: PEP and sanctions screening
body: We will screen clients and beneficial owners against Politically Exposed Persons (PEP) and sanctions lists as part of our AML procedures, and document the outcome in your client risk file.

title: Source of funds and wealth
body: Where risk assessment requires, we will obtain and verify information regarding source of funds and source of wealth before accepting the engagement.
